title: IssuanceMessage
description: Payload published by Portador Service to the SQS issuance queue and consumed by Cartao Service to generate a card.

cardholderId.description: Identifier of the cardholder the card is issued for.

productId.description: Identifier of the product to validate against the source of truth and embed in the card.

correlationId.description: Idempotency and tracing key; unique per issuance request.
